channel.title: hack on Moanrisy Blog
channel.description: Recent content in hack on Moanrisy Blog

item.title: Simple hack by swapping keyboard button
item.description: Default keyboard layout problem The capslock button is big but useless PgUp, PgDn button is merged with the up and down arrow keys Simple solution using the PowerToys app Swap the capslock button with the left control button Swap down keys with fn+PgDn Swap up keys with fn+PgUp
